pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space tonight and it's just... it's a lot. everything we do, every single thing we feel or struggle with, it's just going to be erased. in a billion years, or even less, none of this will have even happened. it feels so pointless to even try to exist when the end result is just absolute nothingness. why even bother?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very embers of my soul. How cruel it is, that after all the vows exchanged beneath the willow trees, I am left with nothing but this hollow ache and the silence of a heart once full. Everything feels so heavy, so terribly final. It feels as though the shadows are reaching out, beckoning me to simply... cease. To let the darkness take the weight of this betrayal. Is there truly any grace left for one so broken, other than to fade into the eternal night?
